title: Fix buffalo (cattle) and customer adding functionality

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Add Buffalo/Cattle' functionality so that submitting the CattleForm successfully creates a new cattle record and the new record appears in the cattle list without errors
acceptanceCriteria: User can open the Add Cattle/Buffalo form and fill in all required fields
Submitting the form sends the correct data to the backend addCattle method
The new cattle record appears in the cattle table immediately after submission
No console errors or silent failures occur during the add operation
Success feedback (toast or confirmation) is shown after adding

file_operations.description: Review and fix the cattle form submission logic to ensure all required fields (breed, ageMonths, dailyMilkProductionLiters, healthStatus, purchaseDate, purchaseCost, notes) are correctly collected and passed to the backend. Ensure the healthStatus field is properly structured as a variant type matching the backend interface (healthy, sick with treatment/medications/condition, or recovered). Add proper error handling and validation feedback.

Review and fix the addCattle mutation hook to ensure it correctly calls the backend addCattle method with all required parameters in the correct order and types. Verify the mutation includes proper success handling (query invalidation for 'allCattle' and 'healthyCattle'), error handling, and returns the new cattle ID. Add success toast notification on successful cattle creation.

Review and fix the integration between the CattleForm component and the addCattle mutation. Ensure the form dialog properly opens, the onSubmit handler correctly invokes the mutation with form data, handles loading states during submission, displays success feedback, closes the dialog on success, and shows error messages if the mutation fails. Verify the cattle list automatically refreshes after successful addition.

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Add Customer' functionality so that submitting the CustomerForm successfully creates a new customer record and the new record appears in the customer list without errors
acceptanceCriteria: User can open the Add Customer form and fill in all required fields (name, address, phone)
Submitting the form sends the correct data to the backend addCustomer method
The new customer record appears in the customer table immediately after submission
No console errors or silent failures occur during the add operation
Success feedback (toast or confirmation) is shown after adding

file_operations.description: Review and fix the customer form submission logic to ensure all required fields (name, address, phone) are correctly collected and validated before submission. Remove or disable the activeStatus toggle when in add mode since new customers should default to active in the backend. Add proper error handling and field validation feedback.

Review and fix the addCustomer mutation hook to ensure it correctly calls the backend addCustomer method with all required parameters (name, address, phone) in the correct order and types. Verify the mutation includes proper success handling (query invalidation for 'customers'), error handling, and returns the new customer ID. Add success toast notification on successful customer creation.

Review and fix the integration between the CustomerForm component and the addCustomer mutation. Ensure the form dialog properly opens, the onSubmit handler correctly invokes the mutation with form data, handles loading states during submission, displays success feedback, closes the dialog on success, and shows error messages if the mutation fails. Verify the customer list and stats automatically refresh after successful addition.
